concept_decisions.evidence_inspected: all assigned titles and complete available abstracts in CONCEPT-BATCH-002_RECORDS.csv
concept_decisions.rationale: Most assigned records center parametric g-formula or g-computation for counterfactual outcome estimation under interventions. Six papers instead center quantile-based g-computation for exposure mixtures, and one SMART methods paper centers TMLE.

concept_decisions.evidence_inspected: all assigned titles and complete available abstracts in CONCEPT-BATCH-002_RECORDS.csv
concept_decisions.rationale: Assigned records consistently center sharp, fuzzy, or methodological regression-discontinuity identification around threshold-based treatment assignment.

concept_decisions.evidence_inspected: all assigned titles and complete available abstracts in CONCEPT-BATCH-002_RECORDS.csv
concept_decisions.rationale: Assigned records consistently use synthetic-control or generalized synthetic-control counterfactual construction for policy, vaccine, or intervention evaluation.

concept_decisions.evidence_inspected: all assigned titles and complete available abstracts in CONCEPT-BATCH-002_RECORDS.csv
concept_decisions.rationale: Assigned records consistently frame the design, estimation, or direct methodological discussion around explicit target-trial emulation.

concept_decisions.retained_canonical_name: Targeted learning and targeted maximum-likelihood estimation
concept_decisions.evidence_inspected: all assigned titles and complete available abstracts in CONCEPT-BATCH-002_RECORDS.csv
concept_decisions.rationale: This concept remains coherent for TMLE-centered estimation papers and also absorbs the SMART paper whose primary methodological contribution is TMLE rather than g-formula.

concept_decisions.retained_canonical_name: Multiple-system estimation for surveillance completeness and burden
concept_decisions.labels_compared: capture_recapture vs hidden_population_capture_recapture vs multistate_capture_recapture vs publication_bias_capture_recapture
concept_decisions.evidence_inspected: all assigned titles and complete available abstracts in CONCEPT-BATCH-002_RECORDS.csv
concept_decisions.rationale: A large core of records uses multiple-list capture-recapture to estimate case burden, incidence, or surveillance completeness. Distinct subsets instead target hidden-population size, multistate disease dynamics, or publication-bias estimation, which rely on different estimands and assumptions.

concept_decisions.retained_canonical_name: Surveillance ascertainment validation and misclassification correction
concept_decisions.evidence_inspected: all assigned titles and complete available abstracts in CONCEPT-BATCH-002_RECORDS.csv
concept_decisions.rationale: The retained core validates surveillance proxies, self-report, case ascertainment, and bias correction. Separate subsets instead center latent-class or imperfect-reference diagnostic identification or classical diagnostic-accuracy synthesis.

concept_decisions.evidence_inspected: all assigned titles and complete available abstracts in CONCEPT-BATCH-002_RECORDS.csv
concept_decisions.rationale: Most records use latent-class methods for clustering, risk segmentation, preference segmentation, or phenotyping. Distinct subsets instead use latent-class identification for no-gold-standard diagnostics or partially latent-class etiology models with different estimands and identification structure.

reassignments.to_canonical_name: Quantile-based g-computation for exposure mixtures
reassignments.rationale: Centers quantile-based g-computation for joint exposure-mixture contrasts rather than parametric g-formula recursion.

reassignments.to_canonical_name: Targeted learning and targeted maximum-likelihood estimation
reassignments.rationale: Centers TMLE for efficient dynamic-regime estimation, with g-computation only as a comparator.

reassignments.to_canonical_name: Quantile-based g-computation for exposure mixtures
reassignments.rationale: Centers quantile-based g-computation for joint exposure-mixture contrasts rather than parametric g-formula recursion.

reassignments.to_canonical_name: Capture-recapture for hidden-population size estimation
reassignments.rationale: Primary estimand is hidden or key population size rather than surveillance under-ascertainment.

reassignments.to_canonical_name: Multistate capture-recapture for disease dynamics
reassignments.rationale: Primary estimand is state transition, diversity, or host-pathogen dynamic structure rather than simple multiple-list completeness.

reassignments.to_canonical_name: Capture-recapture for publication-bias estimation
reassignments.rationale: Applies capture-recapture to missing-study estimation in evidence synthesis rather than surveillance lists.

new_concepts.rationale: Created for papers whose primary method is qgcomp or related mixture-effect estimation rather than parametric g-formula recursion.
Created for capture-recapture studies whose primary estimand is the size or prevalence of hidden or key populations.
Created for capture-recapture studies modeling transitions, diversity, or host-pathogen dynamics rather than simple multiple-list completeness.
Created for the capture-recapture application that estimates missing studies rather than persons or cases.

new_concepts.canonical_name: Diagnostic latent-class models without a gold standard
new_concepts.rationale: Created for latent-class and imperfect-reference models that identify diagnostic sensitivity, specificity, prevalence, or related measurement parameters without a true gold standard.
Created for systematic reviews and meta-analyses centered on reference-standard diagnostic accuracy estimation.
Created for attributable-fraction and case-control etiology models that infer latent pathogen causes from multiple imperfect tests.

concerns: ordered_key_sha256 was computed from newline-joined candidate_key values in CONCEPT-BATCH-002_RECORDS.csv row order because the manifest does not define the hash convention explicitly.

The retained latent_class_models concept still contains heterogeneous segmentation variants that may warrant finer downstream subdivision if the library requires more granular latent-structure taxonomy.
